title: Airtable + Monday integration
excerpt:
Hi, 
We are looking for a way to sync Monday data with Airtable whenever any update happens on Monday. Can you please guide us on how we can achieve this feature?

posts.author: kdkasturiidey (Kasturi Dey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

We are looking for a way to sync Monday data with Airtable whenever any update happens on Monday. Can you please guide us on how we can achieve this feature?

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @kdkasturiidey, thanks for posting!

At the moment we do no have a native integration with Airtable. That being said, you could connect monday.com with Airtable through Zapier: Connect your monday.com to Airtable integration in 2 minutes | Zapier.

posts.author: Alex.Robinson (Alex Robinson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @kdkasturiidey
Here at JT’s Cloud we would also be able to build you a custom integration to be able to achieve your requirements.
Please feel free to book in a meeting so we can scope all your specific requirements and provide a quotation to complete this.
